---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new feature
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
<!-- Clear and concise description of the feature -->

## Problem/Use Case
<!-- What problem does this solve? Who needs this? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- How should this feature work? -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Other approaches you've considered -->

## Enterprise/Business Value
<!-- How does this benefit enterprise or AI-pipeline use cases? -->

## Example Usage
```go
// Example code showing how this feature would be used
```

## Implementation Considerations
<!-- Technical details, breaking changes, dependencies -->

## Scope
- [ ] This feature is generic and reusable
- [ ] This feature maintains the zero-dependency guarantee
- [ ] This feature aligns with text sanitization use cases

## Additional Context
<!-- Screenshots, diagrams, references to similar implementations -->

## Checklist
- [ ] I have searched existing issues/PRs
- [ ] No new external dependencies are required
- [ ] I've described the business value
- [ ] I've considered alternative approaches
